data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: All primary data (xG, PPG, odds) strongly aligns, indicating Sporting CP's significant superiority. Missing data (standings, H2H, model, specific O/U & BTTS odds) limits full context but doesn't conflict with core indicators.

REASON: Sporting CP boasts significantly higher xG (2.24 vs 1.03) and PPG (2.43 vs 0.79). Home win odds (1.12) reflect extreme favoritism. With an xG of 2.24, Sporting CP scoring over 1.5 goals is highly probable and offers slightly better value than a straight
